name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished, professional slides without generic filler content.
problem: Creating compelling presentations is time-consuming, and most AI slide tools produce templated, low-quality output that still requires heavy manual cleanup. Chronicle 2.0 aims to close the gap between AI speed and design quality, giving teams slides that look intentional rather than auto-generated. This saves professionals the rework cycle of fixing AI-generated slop before a deck is client-ready.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with structured, on-brand storytelling
Creating client-facing proposals and project update presentations
Producing internal team briefings and strategy documents quickly
Turning written reports or outlines into visually coherent slide decks
